<h1 align="left">
  <img src="routes/favicon.svg" width="30" height="30" alt="" />
  &nbsp;
  Placard
</h1>

[Home Page](https://placard.cc/)  • [Service Connectors](https://placard.cc/connectors)

Compile the web into a badge. Placard enables you to create high-quality rasterized badges with the power of HTML and CSS. 

Full API compatability with [shields.io](https://github.com/badges/shields).

## Rendered by Placard
